221 typedef enum StreamType
222 {
224 STREAMTYPE_NONE = 0x00000000,
227 STREAMTYPE_VOICE = 0x00000001,
230 STREAMTYPE_VIDEOCAPTURE = 0x00000002,
233 STREAMTYPE_MEDIAFILE_AUDIO = 0x00000004,
236 STREAMTYPE_MEDIAFILE_VIDEO = 0x00000008,
239 STREAMTYPE_DESKTOP = 0x00000010,
243 STREAMTYPE_DESKTOPINPUT = 0x00000020,
245 STREAMTYPE_MEDIAFILE = STREAMTYPE_MEDIAFILE_AUDIO |
246 STREAMTYPE_MEDIAFILE_VIDEO,
255 STREAMTYPE_CHANNELMSG = 0x00000040,
261 STREAMTYPE_LOCALMEDIAPLAYBACK_AUDIO = 0x00000080,
262
265 STREAMTYPE_CLASSROOM_ALL = STREAMTYPE_VOICE |
266 STREAMTYPE_VIDEOCAPTURE |
267 STREAMTYPE_DESKTOP |
268 STREAMTYPE_MEDIAFILE |
269 STREAMTYPE_CHANNELMSG,
270 } StreamType;
271
273 typedef UINT32 StreamTypes;

403 typedef struct SoundDevice

2196 typedef struct User
2197 {
2201 INT32 nUserID;
2206 TTCHAR szUsername[TT_STRLEN];
2211 INT32 nUserData;
2215 UserTypes uUserType;
2217 TTCHAR szIPAddress[TT_STRLEN];
2223 UINT32 uVersion;
2229 INT32 nChannelID;
2235 Subscriptions uLocalSubscriptions;
2241 Subscriptions uPeerSubscriptions;
2246 TTCHAR szNickname[TT_STRLEN];
2251 INT32 nStatusMode;
2256 TTCHAR szStatusMsg[TT_STRLEN];
2259 UserStates uUserState;
2262 TTCHAR szMediaStorageDir[TT_STRLEN];
2268 INT32 nVolumeVoice;
2274 INT32 nVolumeMediaFile;
2278 INT32 nStoppedDelayVoice;
2282 INT32 nStoppedDelayMediaFile;
2287 float soundPositionVoice[3];
2292 float soundPositionMediaFile[3];
2297 TTBOOL stereoPlaybackVoice[2];
2302 TTBOOL stereoPlaybackMediaFile[2];
2306 INT32 nBufferMSecVoice;
2310 INT32 nBufferMSecMediaFile;
2314 INT32 nActiveAdaptiveDelayMSec;
2318 TTCHAR szClientName[TT_STRLEN];
2319 } User;
2320
2325 typedef struct UserStatistics
2326 {
2328 INT64 nVoicePacketsRecv;
2330 INT64 nVoicePacketsLost;
2333 INT64 nVideoCapturePacketsRecv;
2335 INT64 nVideoCaptureFramesRecv;
2338 INT64 nVideoCaptureFramesLost;
2341 INT64 nVideoCaptureFramesDropped;
2343 INT64 nMediaFileAudioPacketsRecv;
2345 INT64 nMediaFileAudioPacketsLost;
2348 INT64 nMediaFileVideoPacketsRecv;
2350 INT64 nMediaFileVideoFramesRecv;
2353 INT64 nMediaFileVideoFramesLost;
2356 INT64 nMediaFileVideoFramesDropped;
2357 } UserStatistics;
2358
2367 typedef enum TextMsgType
2368 {
2370 MSGTYPE_NONE = 0,
2373 MSGTYPE_USER = 1,
2378 MSGTYPE_CHANNEL = 2,
2381 MSGTYPE_BROADCAST = 3,
2384 MSGTYPE_CUSTOM = 4
2385 } TextMsgType;
2386
2393 typedef struct TextMessage
2394 {
2396 TextMsgType nMsgType;
2398 INT32 nFromUserID;
2400 TTCHAR szFromUsername[TT_STRLEN];
2402 INT32 nToUserID;
2405 INT32 nChannelID;
2408 TTCHAR szMessage[TT_STRLEN];
2411 TTBOOL bMore;
2412 } TextMessage;
2420 typedef enum ChannelType
2421 {
2424 CHANNEL_DEFAULT = 0x0000,
2427 CHANNEL_PERMANENT = 0x0001,
2429 CHANNEL_SOLO_TRANSMIT = 0x0002,
2440 CHANNEL_CLASSROOM = 0x0004,
2445 CHANNEL_OPERATOR_RECVONLY = 0x0008,
2448 CHANNEL_NO_VOICEACTIVATION = 0x0010,
2450 CHANNEL_NO_RECORDING = 0x0020,
2453 CHANNEL_HIDDEN = 0x0040
2454 } ChannelType;
2455
2458 typedef UINT32 ChannelTypes;
2459
2470 typedef struct Channel
2471 {
2474 INT32 nParentID;
2476 INT32 nChannelID;
2478 TTCHAR szName[TT_STRLEN];
2480 TTCHAR szTopic[TT_STRLEN];
2484 TTCHAR szPassword[TT_STRLEN];
2487 TTBOOL bPassword;
2489 ChannelTypes uChannelType;
2493 INT32 nUserData;
2495 INT64 nDiskQuota;
2498 TTCHAR szOpPassword[TT_STRLEN];
2500 INT32 nMaxUsers;
2502 AudioCodec audiocodec;
2505 AudioConfig audiocfg;
2561 INT32 transmitUsers[TT_TRANSMITUSERS_MAX][2];
2566 INT32 transmitUsersQueue[TT_TRANSMITQUEUE_MAX];
2574 INT32 nTransmitUsersQueueDelayMSec;
2578 INT32 nTimeOutTimerVoiceMSec;
2582 INT32 nTimeOutTimerMediaFileMSec;
2583 } Channel;
2584
2585
2587 typedef enum FileTransferStatus
2588 {
2590 FILETRANSFER_CLOSED = 0,
2592 FILETRANSFER_ERROR = 1,
2594 FILETRANSFER_ACTIVE = 2,
2596 FILETRANSFER_FINISHED = 3
2597 } FileTransferStatus;
2598
2602 typedef struct FileTransfer
2603 {
2605 FileTransferStatus nStatus;
2607 INT32 nTransferID;
2609 INT32 nChannelID;
2611 TTCHAR szLocalFilePath[TT_STRLEN];
2613 TTCHAR szRemoteFileName[TT_STRLEN];
2615 INT64 nFileSize;
2617 INT64 nTransferred;
2619 TTBOOL bInbound;
2620 } FileTransfer;
2621
2622
2626 typedef struct RemoteFile
2627 {
2629 INT32 nChannelID;
2631 INT32 nFileID;
2633 TTCHAR szFileName[TT_STRLEN];
2635 INT64 nFileSize;

2641 } RemoteFile;
2652 typedef struct EncryptionContext
2653 {
2659 TTCHAR szCertificateFile[TT_STRLEN];
2661 TTCHAR szPrivateKeyFile[TT_STRLEN];
2666 TTCHAR szCAFile[TT_STRLEN];
2669 TTCHAR szCADir[TT_STRLEN];
2676 TTBOOL bVerifyPeer;
2687 TTBOOL bVerifyClientOnce;
2698 INT32 nVerifyDepth;
2699 } EncryptionContext;
2700
2707 typedef struct ClientKeepAlive
2708 {
2719 INT32 nConnectionLostMSec;
2723 INT32 nTcpKeepAliveIntervalMSec;
2729 INT32 nUdpKeepAliveIntervalMSec;
2735 INT32 nUdpKeepAliveRTXMSec;
2742 INT32 nUdpConnectRTXMSec;
2750 INT32 nUdpConnectTimeoutMSec;
2751 } ClientKeepAlive;
2752
2757 typedef struct ClientStatistics
2758 {
2760 INT64 nUdpBytesSent;
2762 INT64 nUdpBytesRecv;
2764 INT64 nVoiceBytesSent;
2766 INT64 nVoiceBytesRecv;
2768 INT64 nVideoCaptureBytesSent;
2770 INT64 nVideoCaptureBytesRecv;
2772 INT64 nMediaFileAudioBytesSent;
2774 INT64 nMediaFileAudioBytesRecv;
2776 INT64 nMediaFileVideoBytesSent;
2778 INT64 nMediaFileVideoBytesRecv;
2780 INT64 nDesktopBytesSent;
2782 INT64 nDesktopBytesRecv;
2786 INT32 nUdpPingTimeMs;
2790 INT32 nTcpPingTimeMs;
2793 INT32 nTcpServerSilenceSec;
2796 INT32 nUdpServerSilenceSec;
2808 INT32 nSoundInputDeviceDelayMSec;
2809 } ClientStatistics;
2810
2816 typedef struct JitterConfig
2817 {
2819 INT32 nFixedDelayMSec;
2821 TTBOOL bUseAdativeDejitter;
2824 INT32 nMaxAdaptiveDelayMSec;
2831 INT32 nActiveAdaptiveDelayMSec;
2832 } JitterConfig;
2833
2843 typedef enum ClientError
2844 {
2846 CMDERR_SUCCESS = 0,
2847
2848 /* COMMAND ERRORS 1000-1999 ARE DUE TO INVALID OR UNSUPPORTED
2849 * COMMANDS */
2850
2852 CMDERR_SYNTAX_ERROR = 1000,
2857 CMDERR_UNKNOWN_COMMAND = 1001,
2860 CMDERR_MISSING_PARAMETER = 1002,
2863 CMDERR_INCOMPATIBLE_PROTOCOLS = 1003,
2868 CMDERR_UNKNOWN_AUDIOCODEC = 1004,
2871 CMDERR_INVALID_USERNAME = 1005,
2872
2873 /* COMMAND ERRORS 2000-2999 ARE DUE TO INSUFFICIENT RIGHTS */
2874
2880 CMDERR_INCORRECT_CHANNEL_PASSWORD = 2001,
2886 CMDERR_INVALID_ACCOUNT = 2002,
2892 CMDERR_MAX_SERVER_USERS_EXCEEDED = 2003,
2898 CMDERR_MAX_CHANNEL_USERS_EXCEEDED = 2004,
2903 CMDERR_SERVER_BANNED = 2005,
2935 CMDERR_NOT_AUTHORIZED = 2006,
2942 CMDERR_MAX_DISKUSAGE_EXCEEDED = 2008,
2948 CMDERR_INCORRECT_OP_PASSWORD = 2010,
2949
2954 CMDERR_AUDIOCODEC_BITRATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED = 2011,
2955
2961 CMDERR_MAX_LOGINS_PER_IPADDRESS_EXCEEDED = 2012,
2962
2965 CMDERR_MAX_CHANNELS_EXCEEDED = 2013,
2966
2971 CMDERR_COMMAND_FLOOD = 2014,
2972
2978 CMDERR_CHANNEL_BANNED = 2015,
2979
2984 CMDERR_MAX_FILETRANSFERS_EXCEEDED = 2016,
2985
2986 /* COMMAND ERRORS 3000-3999 ARE DUE TO INVALID STATE OF CLIENT INSTANCE */
2987
2993 CMDERR_NOT_LOGGEDIN = 3000,
2994
2998 CMDERR_ALREADY_LOGGEDIN = 3001,
3002 CMDERR_NOT_IN_CHANNEL = 3002,
3007 CMDERR_ALREADY_IN_CHANNEL = 3003,
3011 CMDERR_CHANNEL_ALREADY_EXISTS = 3004,
3029 CMDERR_CHANNEL_NOT_FOUND = 3005,
3040 CMDERR_USER_NOT_FOUND = 3006,
3045 CMDERR_BAN_NOT_FOUND = 3007,
3050 CMDERR_FILETRANSFER_NOT_FOUND = 3008,
3055 CMDERR_OPENFILE_FAILED = 3009,
3060 CMDERR_ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND = 3010,
3065 CMDERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND = 3011,
3070 CMDERR_FILE_ALREADY_EXISTS = 3012,
3075 CMDERR_FILESHARING_DISABLED = 3013,
3080 CMDERR_CHANNEL_HAS_USERS = 3015,
3081
3085 CMDERR_LOGINSERVICE_UNAVAILABLE = 3016,
3086
3091 CMDERR_CHANNEL_CANNOT_BE_HIDDEN = 3017,
3092
3093 /* ERRORS 10000-10999 ARE NOT COMMAND ERRORS BUT INSTEAD
3094 * ERRORS IN THE CLIENT INSTANCE. */
3095
3103 INTERR_SNDINPUT_FAILURE = 10000,
3112 INTERR_SNDOUTPUT_FAILURE = 10001,
3116 INTERR_AUDIOCODEC_INIT_FAILED = 10002,
3118 INTERR_SPEEXDSP_INIT_FAILED = 10003,
3126 INTERR_AUDIOPREPROCESSOR_INIT_FAILED = 10003,
3134 INTERR_TTMESSAGE_QUEUE_OVERFLOW = 10004,
3141 INTERR_SNDEFFECT_FAILURE = 10005,
3142 } ClientError;
3143
3145 typedef struct ClientErrorMsg
3146 {
3148 INT32 nErrorNo;
3150 TTCHAR szErrorMsg[TT_STRLEN];
3151 } ClientErrorMsg;
3161 typedef enum ClientEvent
3162 {
3163 CLIENTEVENT_NONE = 0,
3164
3177 CLIENTEVENT_CON_SUCCESS = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 10,
3188 CLIENTEVENT_CON_CRYPT_ERROR = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 15,
3199 CLIENTEVENT_CON_FAILED = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 20,
3216 CLIENTEVENT_CON_LOST = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 30,
3228 CLIENTEVENT_CON_MAX_PAYLOAD_UPDATED = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 40,
3243 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_PROCESSING = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 200,
3258 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_ERROR = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 210,
3271 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_SUCCESS = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 220,
3290 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_MYSELF_LOGGEDIN = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 230,
3300 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_MYSELF_LOGGEDOUT = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 240,
3311 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_MYSELF_KICKED = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 250,
3323 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_USER_LOGGEDIN = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 260,
3338 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_USER_LOGGEDOUT = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 270,
3348 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_USER_UPDATE = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 280,
3358 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_USER_JOINED = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 290,
3366 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_USER_LEFT = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 300,
3377 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_USER_TEXTMSG = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 310,
3387 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_CHANNEL_NEW = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 320,
3397 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_CHANNEL_UPDATE = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 330,
3408 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_CHANNEL_REMOVE = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 340,
3419 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_SERVER_UPDATE = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 350,
3429 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_SERVERSTATISTICS = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 360,
3442 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_FILE_NEW = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 370,
3450 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_FILE_REMOVE = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 380,
3460 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_USERACCOUNT = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 390,
3470 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_BANNEDUSER = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 400,
3480 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_USERACCOUNT_NEW = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 410,
3490 CLIENTEVENT_CMD_USERACCOUNT_REMOVE = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 420,
3511 CLIENTEVENT_USER_STATECHANGE = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 500,
3525 CLIENTEVENT_USER_VIDEOCAPTURE = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 510,
3539 CLIENTEVENT_USER_MEDIAFILE_VIDEO = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 520,
3555 CLIENTEVENT_USER_DESKTOPWINDOW = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 530,
3567 CLIENTEVENT_USER_DESKTOPCURSOR = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 540,
3591 CLIENTEVENT_USER_DESKTOPINPUT = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 550,
3605 CLIENTEVENT_USER_RECORD_MEDIAFILE = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 560,
3623 CLIENTEVENT_USER_AUDIOBLOCK = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 570,
3638 CLIENTEVENT_INTERNAL_ERROR = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1000,
3653 CLIENTEVENT_VOICE_ACTIVATION = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1010,
3665 CLIENTEVENT_HOTKEY = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1020,
3685 CLIENTEVENT_HOTKEY_TEST = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1030,
3703 CLIENTEVENT_FILETRANSFER = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1040,
3720 CLIENTEVENT_DESKTOPWINDOW_TRANSFER = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1050,
3734 CLIENTEVENT_STREAM_MEDIAFILE = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1060,
3748 CLIENTEVENT_LOCAL_MEDIAFILE = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1070,
3771 CLIENTEVENT_AUDIOINPUT = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1080,
3792 CLIENTEVENT_USER_FIRSTVOICESTREAMPACKET = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1090,
3809 CLIENTEVENT_SOUNDDEVICE_ADDED = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1100,
3827 CLIENTEVENT_SOUNDDEVICE_REMOVED = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1110,
3845 CLIENTEVENT_SOUNDDEVICE_UNPLUGGED = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1120,
3862 CLIENTEVENT_SOUNDDEVICE_NEW_DEFAULT_INPUT = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1130,
3879 CLIENTEVENT_SOUNDDEVICE_NEW_DEFAULT_OUTPUT = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1140,
3898 CLIENTEVENT_SOUNDDEVICE_NEW_DEFAULT_INPUT_COMDEVICE = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1150,
3917 CLIENTEVENT_SOUNDDEVICE_NEW_DEFAULT_OUTPUT_COMDEVICE = CLIENTEVENT_NONE + 1160,
3918
3919 } ClientEvent;
3920
3921 /* List of structures used internally by TeamTalk. */
3922 typedef enum TTType
3923 {
3924 __NONE = 0,
3925 __AUDIOCODEC = 1,
3926 __BANNEDUSER = 2,
3927 __VIDEOFORMAT = 3,
3928 __OPUSCODEC = 4,
3929 __CHANNEL = 5,
3930 __CLIENTSTATISTICS = 6,
3931 __REMOTEFILE = 7,
3932 __FILETRANSFER = 8,
3933 __MEDIAFILESTATUS = 9,
3934 __SERVERPROPERTIES = 10,
3935 __SERVERSTATISTICS = 11,
3936 __SOUNDDEVICE = 12,
3937 __SPEEXCODEC = 13,
3938 __TEXTMESSAGE = 14,
3939 __WEBMVP8CODEC = 15,
3940 __TTMESSAGE = 16,
3941 __USER = 17,
3942 __USERACCOUNT = 18,
3943 __USERSTATISTICS = 19,
3944 __VIDEOCAPTUREDEVICE = 20,
3945 __VIDEOCODEC = 21,
3946 __AUDIOCONFIG = 22,
3947 __SPEEXVBRCODEC = 23,
3948 __VIDEOFRAME = 24,
3949 __AUDIOBLOCK = 25,
3950 __AUDIOFORMAT = 26,
3951 __MEDIAFILEINFO = 27,
3952 __CLIENTERRORMSG = 28,
3953 __TTBOOL = 29,
3954 __INT32 = 30,
3955 __DESKTOPINPUT = 31,
3956 __SPEEXDSP = 32,
3957 __STREAMTYPE = 33,
3958 __AUDIOPREPROCESSORTYPE = 34,
3959 __AUDIOPREPROCESSOR = 35,
3960 __TTAUDIOPREPROCESSOR = 36,
3961 __MEDIAFILEPLAYBACK = 37,
3962 __CLIENTKEEPALIVE = 38,
3963 __UINT32 = 39,
3964 __AUDIOINPUTPROGRESS = 40,
3965 __JITTERCONFIG = 41,
3966 __WEBRTCAUDIOPREPROCESSOR = 42,
3967 __ENCRYPTIONCONTEXT = 43,
3968 __SOUNDDEVICEEFFECTS = 44,
3969 __DESKTOPWINDOW = 45,
3970 __ABUSEPREVENTION = 46,
3971 } TTType;
3972
3983 typedef struct TTMessage
3984 {
3986 ClientEvent nClientEvent;
3988 INT32 nSource;
3990 TTType ttType;
3992 UINT32 uReserved;
3993 union
3994 {
3996 Channel channel;
3998 ClientErrorMsg clienterrormsg;
4000 DesktopInput desktopinput;
4002 FileTransfer filetransfer;
4004 MediaFileInfo mediafileinfo;
4006 RemoteFile remotefile;
4008 ServerProperties serverproperties;
4010 ServerStatistics serverstatistics;
4012 TextMessage textmessage;
4014 User user;
4016 UserAccount useraccount;
4018 BannedUser banneduser;
4020 TTBOOL bActive;
4022 INT32 nBytesRemain;
4024 INT32 nStreamID;
4026 INT32 nPayloadSize;
4028 StreamType nStreamType;
4030 AudioInputProgress audioinputprogress;
4032 SoundDevice sounddevice;
4033 /* brief First byte in union. */
4034 char data[1];
4035 };
4036 } TTMessage;
4037
4056 typedef enum ClientFlag
4057 {
4062 CLIENT_CLOSED = 0x00000000,
4066 CLIENT_SNDINPUT_READY = 0x00000001,
4070 CLIENT_SNDOUTPUT_READY = 0x00000002,
4076 CLIENT_SNDINOUTPUT_DUPLEX = 0x00000004,
4083 CLIENT_SNDINPUT_VOICEACTIVATED = 0x00000008,
4090 CLIENT_SNDINPUT_VOICEACTIVE = 0x00000010,
4093 CLIENT_SNDOUTPUT_MUTE = 0x00000020,
4099 CLIENT_SNDOUTPUT_AUTO3DPOSITION = 0x00000040,
4103 CLIENT_VIDEOCAPTURE_READY = 0x00000080,
4106 CLIENT_TX_VOICE = 0x00000100,
4110 CLIENT_TX_VIDEOCAPTURE = 0x00000200,
4116 CLIENT_TX_DESKTOP = 0x00000400,
4121 CLIENT_DESKTOP_ACTIVE = 0x00000800,
4125 CLIENT_MUX_AUDIOFILE = 0x00001000,
4128 CLIENT_CONNECTING = 0x00002000,
4133 CLIENT_CONNECTED = 0x00004000,
4136 CLIENT_CONNECTION = CLIENT_CONNECTING | CLIENT_CONNECTED,
4140 CLIENT_AUTHORIZED = 0x00008000,
4145 CLIENT_STREAM_AUDIO = 0x00010000,
4150 CLIENT_STREAM_VIDEO = 0x00020000
4151 } ClientFlag;
4152
4155 typedef UINT32 ClientFlags;

Remove an application from the Windows Firewall exception list.

Add an application to the Windows Firewall exception list.

TEAMTALKDLL_API TTBOOL TT_Firewall_Enable(IN TTBOOL bEnable)
Enable/disable the Windows Firewall.
TT_Firewall_AppExceptionExists
TEAMTALKDLL_API TTBOOL TT_Firewall_AppExceptionExists(IN const TTCHAR *szExecutable)
Check if an executable is already in the Windows Firewall exception list.
TT_HotKey_IsActive

Check whether hotkey is active.

TEAMTALKDLL_API TTBOOL TT_HotKey_GetKeyString(IN TTInstance *lpTTInstance, IN INT32 nVKCode, OUT TTCHAR szKeyName[TT_STRLEN])
Get a string description of the virtual-key code.

Register a global hotkey.
TT_HotKey_RemoveTestHook
TEAMTALKDLL_API TTBOOL TT_HotKey_RemoveTestHook(IN TTInstance *lpTTInstance)
Remove the test hook again so the hWnd in TT_HotKey_InstallTestHook will no longer be notified.
TT_HotKey_Unregister
TEAMTALKDLL_API TTBOOL TT_HotKey_Unregister(IN TTInstance *lpTTInstance, IN INT32 nHotKeyID)
Unregister a registered hotkey.
TT_HotKey_InstallTestHook
TEAMTALKDLL_API TTBOOL TT_HotKey_InstallTestHook(IN TTInstance *lpTTInstance, IN HWND hWnd, UINT32 uMsg)
Install a test hook so the HWND will be messaged whenever a key or mouse button is pressed.
TT_InitTeamTalkPoll
TEAMTALKDLL_API TTInstance * TT_InitTeamTalkPoll(void)
Create a new TeamTalk client instance where events are 'polled' using TT_GetMessage.
TT_GetVersion
TEAMTALKDLL_API const TTCHAR * TT_GetVersion(void)
Get the DLL's version number.
TT_PumpMessage

Cause client instance event thread to schedule an update event.
TT_GetMessage
TEAMTALKDLL_API TTBOOL TT_GetMessage(IN TTInstance *lpTTInstance, OUT TTMessage *pMsg, IN const INT32 *pnWaitMs)
Poll for events in the client instance.
TTInstance
VOID TTInstance
Pointer to a TeamTalk client instance created by TT_InitTeamTalk.
